llm_instruction: Use this file only after a candidate job was selected. Copy the BASF URL exactly from job.url; never construct job links.

job.title: Customs Classification Specialist
job.description: About The Role Join our company as a key expert in customs classification of chemical products. In this role, you will ensure compliance with customs regulations and support efficient processes across Asia Pacific while being connected to a global community. How You Will Do It • Act as the primary contact for customs classification requests in the Asia Pacific region. • Perform accurate and timely customs classification for products, raw materials, and merchandise according to local and international regulations. • Monitor and analyze customs regulations in China and Asia Pacific; implement compliant processes proactively. • Support process improvements with a focus on simplification and digitalization. • Collaborate closely with Supply Chain, Sales, and Procurement teams to ensure seamless operations. • Participate in global customs classification communities and share best practices. • Additional tasks may include handling Dangerous Goods requests, packaging consulting and article release for the Asia Pacific region. What We Look For • Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Chemistry, Chemical Engineering, or a related scientific field. • Proven experience in customs classification of chemical products in China; knowledge of other Asian countries is a plus. • Several years of experience in chemical industry or related. • Strong English communication skills (written and spoken). • Familiarity with SAP GTS; knowledge of SAP EHS and other modules (TM, OTC) is advantageous. • Analytical mindset, structured approach, and interest in automation tools and data-driven insights. • Collaborative and proactive attitude. 请时刻警惕任何可能的招聘欺诈行为！请注意，巴斯夫绝不会在任何情况下向候选人以任何形式收取任何费用。
